caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting, positioned in front of a grey, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a black long-sleeved shirt over a grey undershirt. A professional condenser microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins with his eyes partially closed and his right hand raised and open. As the sequence progresses, he opens his eyes and looks toward the right side of the frame, while his right hand moves closer to his body. His facial expressions shift slightly, reflecting the cadence of his speech, but his position relative to the microphone and the background remains constant. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
